summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_1Text1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "ky3 Launcher（以下简称"本软件"）是一款基于 Snap Hutao 开源项目进行二次开发的原神第三方辅助工具。本软件遵循 MIT 开源许可协议发布，旨在为原神玩家提供优化体验，体感，等便捷功能。"

en-US Value: "ky3 Launcher (hereinafter referred to as "the software") is a Genshin Impact third-party auxiliary tool developed based on the Snap Hutao open source project. This software is released under the MIT open source license agreement and aims to provide Genshin Impact players with optimized experience, body sensing, and other convenient functions."
zh-TW Value: "ky3 Launcher（以下簡稱"本軟體"）是一款基於 Snap Hutao 開源專案進行二次開發的原神第三方輔助工具。本軟體遵循 MIT 開源許可協議釋出，旨在為原神玩家提供最佳化體驗，體感，等便捷功能。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_1Text2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件的原始项目 Snap Hutao(现已停止维护） 由 DGP Studio 开发并维护，Launcher 基于其开源代码进行功能定制、界面优化与持续更新。"

en-US Value: "The original project of this software, Snap Hutao (now out of maintenance), was developed and maintained by DGP Studio. Launcher is based on its open source code for function customization, interface optimization and continuous updates."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體的原始專案 Snap Hutao(現已停止維護） 由 DGP Studio 開發並維護，Launcher 基於其開原始碼進行功能定製、介面最佳化與持續更新。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_1Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_2Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "在所有副本或重要部分中保留原始版权声明与 MIT 许可证文本。"
en-US Value: "Retain the original copyright notice and MIT License text in all copies or significant portions."
zh-TW Value: "在所有副本或重要部分中保留原始版權宣告與 MIT 許可證文字。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_2Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "在二次分发或修改版本中明确标注您的修改内容，不得冒充原始项目。"
en-US Value: "Clearly mark your modifications in redistributions or modified versions and do not pass them off as the original project."
zh-TW Value: "在二次分發或修改版本中明確標註您的修改內容，不得冒充原始專案。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_2Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件按"原样"（AS IS）提供，不附带任何明示或暗示的担保。"
en-US Value: "THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體按"原樣"（AS IS）提供，不附帶任何明示或暗示的擔保。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_2Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "根据 MIT 开源许可协议，您可以自由地使用、复制、修改和分发本软件，但须遵守以下条件："
en-US Value: "Under the MIT Open Source License, you are free to use, copy, modify and distribute this software, subject to the following conditions:"
zh-TW Value: "根據 MIT 開源許可協議，您可以自由地使用、複製、修改和分發本軟體，但須遵守以下條件："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_2Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_3Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "不得将本软件用于任何违反您所在国家或地区法律法规的用途。"
en-US Value: "This software may not be used for any purpose that violates the laws and regulations of your country or region."
zh-TW Value: "不得將本軟體用於任何違反您所在國家或地區法律法規的用途。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_3Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "不得利用本软件进行任何形式的游戏作弊、外挂制作、传播或非法牟利。"
en-US Value: "This software may not be used for any form of game cheating, plug-in production, dissemination or illegal profit-making."
zh-TW Value: "不得利用本軟體進行任何形式的遊戲作弊、外掛製作、傳播或非法牟利。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_3Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "不得对本软件进行反编译、反汇编或逆向工程（法律明确允许且不可通过协议排除的除外）。"
en-US Value: "The Software may not be decompiled, disassembled or reverse engineered (except to the extent expressly permitted by law and not excluded by agreement)."
zh-TW Value: "不得對本軟體進行反編譯、反彙編或逆向工程（法律明確允許且不可透過協議排除的除外）。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_3Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "不得删除或篡改本软件中的版权声明、许可声明或其他权利标识。"
en-US Value: "You may not delete or alter the copyright notice, license notice or other rights markings in this software."
zh-TW Value: "不得刪除或篡改本軟體中的版權宣告、許可宣告或其他權利標識。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_3Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "您在使用本软件时，应当严格遵守以下限制："
en-US Value: "You should strictly abide by the following restrictions when using this software:"
zh-TW Value: "您在使用本軟體時，應當嚴格遵守以下限制："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide1_3Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件提供以下核心功能，所有功能均在本地运行，通过调用游戏官方公开接口获取数据："
en-US Value: "This software provides the following core functions. All functions are run locally and data is obtained by calling the official public interface of the game:"
zh-TW Value: "本軟體提供以下核心功能，所有功能均在本地執行，透過呼叫遊戲官方公開介面獲取資料："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "第二章 核心功能说明"
zh-TW Value: "第二章 核心功能說明"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_1Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "支持自定义游戏启动参数（分辨率、窗口模式、HDR、附加程序选择等）。"
en-US Value: "Support custom game launch parameters (resolution, window mode, HDR, add-on selection, etc.)."
zh-TW Value: "支援自定義遊戲啟動引數（解析度、視窗模式、HDR、附加程式選擇等）。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_1Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "支持多账号管理与快速切换，登录凭证存储在本地 SQLite 数据库中。"
en-US Value: "Supports multi-account management and quick switching, and login credentials are stored in the local SQLite database."
zh-TW Value: "支援多賬號管理與快速切換，登入憑證儲存在本地 SQLite 資料庫中。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_1Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "支持 FPS 解锁功能，通过插件加载技术修改游戏帧率限制。"
en-US Value: "Supports FPS unlocking function and modifies game frame rate limit through plug-in loading technology."
zh-TW Value: "支援 FPS 解鎖功能，透過外掛載入技術修改遊戲幀率限制。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_1Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "支持 Island 游戏内增强功能（包括帧率解锁、游戏内辅助等）。"
en-US Value: "Support for Island in-game enhancements (including frame rate unlocking, in-game assistance, and more)."
zh-TW Value: "支援 Island 遊戲內增強功能（包括幀率解鎖、遊戲內輔助等）。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_1Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【2.1 游戏启动管理】"
zh-TW Value: "【2.1 遊戲啟動管理】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_2Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "通过读取游戏日志文件获取祈愿记录查询地址。"
en-US Value: "Obtain the wish record query address by reading the game log file."
zh-TW Value: "透過讀取遊戲日誌檔案獲取祈願記錄查詢地址。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_2Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "使用您的账号凭证直接访问米哈游官方 API 拉取祈愿数据。"
en-US Value: "Use your account credentials to directly access miHoYo's official API to pull wish data."
zh-TW Value: "使用您的賬號憑證直接訪問米哈遊官方 API 拉取祈願資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_2Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "在本地进行数据统计分析，包括出货率、保底计数、历史记录等。"
en-US Value: "Perform local statistical analysis of data, including drop rates, pity counts, historical records, etc."
zh-TW Value: "在本地進行資料統計分析，包括出貨率、保底計數、歷史記錄等。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_2Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "支持 UIGF 标准格式的数据导入与导出，便于与其他工具互通。"
en-US Value: "Supports data import and export in UIGF standard format to facilitate interoperability with other tools."
zh-TW Value: "支援 UIGF 標準格式的資料匯入與匯出，便於與其他工具互通。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_2Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【2.2 祈愿记录分析】"
en-US Value: "[2.2 Analysis of wish records]"
zh-TW Value: "【2.2 祈願記錄分析】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_3Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本地记录与追踪您的游戏成就完成进度。"
en-US Value: "Locally record and track your game achievement completion progress."
zh-TW Value: "本地記錄與追蹤您的遊戲成就完成進度。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_3Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "支持成就数据的存档与管理。"
en-US Value: "Supports archiving and management of achievement data."
zh-TW Value: "支援成就資料的存檔與管理。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_3Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "所有成就数据仅存储在本地数据库中。"
en-US Value: "All achievement data is only stored in the local database."
zh-TW Value: "所有成就資料僅儲存在本地資料庫中。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_3Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_4Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "获取并记录您的深境螺旋挑战数据。"
en-US Value: "Capture and record your Deep Spiral challenge data."
zh-TW Value: "獲取並記錄您的深境螺旋挑戰資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_4Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "获取并记录您的幻想真境剧诗挑战数据。"
en-US Value: "Capture and record your Fantasy Versus Challenge data."
zh-TW Value: "獲取並記錄您的幻想真境劇詩挑戰資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_4Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "所有记录数据存储在本地 SQLite 数据库中。"
en-US Value: "All logging data is stored in a local SQLite database."
zh-TW Value: "所有記錄資料儲存在本地 SQLite 資料庫中。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_4Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【2.4 深境螺旋与幻想真境剧诗记录】"
en-US Value: "[2.4 Deep Spiral and Fantasy Reality Drama Poetry Record]"
zh-TW Value: "【2.4 深境螺旋與幻想真境劇詩記錄】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_5Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "通过 Enka.Network 第三方 API 获取您的角色展柜数据。"
en-US Value: "Get your character showcase data through the Enka.Network third-party API."
zh-TW Value: "透過 Enka.Network 第三方 API 獲取您的角色展櫃資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_5Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "展示角色装备、圣遗物、属性等详细信息。"
en-US Value: "Display detailed information such as character equipment, holy relics, attributes, etc."
zh-TW Value: "展示角色裝備、聖遺物、屬性等詳細資訊。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_5Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "此功能依赖第三方服务 Enka.Network 的可用性。"
en-US Value: "This functionality relies on the availability of the third-party service Enka.Network."
zh-TW Value: "此功能依賴第三方服務 Enka.Network 的可用性。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_5Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_6Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "通过米哈游官方 API 查询您的实时游戏数据。"
en-US Value: "Query your real-time game data through miHoYo official API."
zh-TW Value: "透過米哈遊官方 API 查詢您的實時遊戲資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_6Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "包括树脂恢复、每日委托、探索派遣等信息。"
en-US Value: "Includes Resin recovery, Daily Commissions, Expeditions and other information."
zh-TW Value: "包括樹脂恢復、每日委託、探索派遣等資訊。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_6Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "需要您的账号 Cookie 授权。"
en-US Value: "Your account cookie authorization is required."
zh-TW Value: "需要您的賬號 Cookie 授權。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_6Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_7Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件包含的插件选项功能，通过向游戏进程加载动态链接库（DLL 插件）实现。"
en-US Value: "The plug-in option function included in this software is implemented by loading a dynamic link library (DLL plug-in) into the game process."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體包含的外掛選項功能，透過向遊戲程序載入動態連結庫（DLL 外掛）實現。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_7Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "插件加载过程通过共享内存与游戏进程通信，传递配置参数。"
en-US Value: "The plug-in loading process communicates with the game process through shared memory and transfers configuration parameters."
zh-TW Value: "外掛載入過程透過共享記憶體與遊戲程序通訊，傳遞配置引數。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_7Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "此功能可能被部分安全软件误报，但不包含任何恶意代码。"
en-US Value: "This feature may be falsely reported by some security software, but it does not contain any malicious code."
zh-TW Value: "此功能可能被部分安全軟體誤報，但不包含任何惡意程式碼。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide2_7Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "第三章 知识产权与开源声明"
en-US Value: "Chapter 3 Intellectual Property and Open Source Statement"
zh-TW Value: "第三章 智慧財產權與開源宣告"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_1Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件的原始代码版权归 DGP Studio 所有，基于 MIT 许可协议开源。"
en-US Value: "The original code copyright of this software belongs to DGP Studio and is open source under the MIT license."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體的原始程式碼版權歸 DGP Studio 所有，基於 MIT 許可協議開源。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_1Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "Launcher 对二次开发部分的代码享有相应权利，同样遵循 MIT 许可协议。"
en-US Value: "Launcher has corresponding rights to the secondary development code and also follows the MIT license agreement."
zh-TW Value: "Launcher 對二次開發部分的程式碼享有相應權利，同樣遵循 MIT 許可協議。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_1Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件使用的游戏素材（角色图片、武器图标等）版权归上海米哈游网络科技股份有限公司（miHoYo / HoYoverse）所有。"
en-US Value: "The copyright of the game materials (character pictures, weapon icons, etc.) used in this software belongs to Shanghai MiHoYo Network Technology Co., Ltd. (miHoYo / HoYoverse)."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體使用的遊戲素材（角色圖片、武器圖示等）版權歸上海米哈遊網路科技股份有限公司（miHoYo / HoYoverse）所有。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_1Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_2Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件基于 MIT License 发布，完整许可证文本如下："
en-US Value: "This software is released based on the MIT License. The complete license text is as follows:"
zh-TW Value: "本軟體基於 MIT License 釋出，完整許可證文字如下："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_2Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_3Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: ""原神"（Genshin Impact）是上海米哈游网络科技股份有限公司的合法注册商标。"
en-US Value: ""Genshin Impact" is a legally registered trademark of Shanghai MiHoYo Network Technology Co., Ltd."
zh-TW Value: ""原神"（Genshin Impact）是上海米哈遊網路科技股份有限公司的合法註冊商標。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_3Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: ""Snap Hutao" 是 DGP Studio 的项目名称。"
en-US Value: ""Snap Hutao" is the project name of DGP Studio."
zh-TW Value: ""Snap Hutao" 是 DGP Studio 的專案名稱。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_3Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件名称 "ky3 Launcher" 仅用于标识本二次开发项目，不构成对任何官方商标的侵犯。"
en-US Value: "The name of this software "ky3 Launcher" is only used to identify this secondary development project and does not constitute an infringement of any official trademark."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體名稱 "ky3 Launcher" 僅用於標識本二次開發專案，不構成對任何官方商標的侵犯。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_3Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件的所有界面设计、文案排版如涉及官方游戏元素，均属于米哈游公司的合理使用范畴，本软件不主张对其拥有任何商业或排他性权利。"

en-US Value: "All interface designs and copywriting layouts of this software, if they involve official game elements, fall within the scope of fair use by MiHoYo. This software does not claim any commercial or exclusive rights over them."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體的所有介面設計、文案排版如涉及官方遊戲元素，均屬於米哈遊公司的合理使用範疇，本軟體不主張對其擁有任何商業或排他性權利。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide3_3Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "我们深知用户数据安全的重要性，特此详细说明本软件的数据处理方式和隐私保护措施。"
en-US Value: "We are well aware of the importance of user data security, and hereby detail the data processing methods and privacy protection measures of this software."
zh-TW Value: "我們深知使用者資料安全的重要性，特此詳細說明本軟體的資料處理方式和隱私保護措施。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "第四章 用户数据与隐私政策"
en-US Value: "Chapter 4 User Data and Privacy Policy"
zh-TW Value: "第四章 使用者資料與隱私政策"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_1Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "默认情况下的本地化：除非您主动开启并授权使用云端同步等在线增值服务（详见4.5节），否则您的所有基础用户数据均仅存储在您的本地设备中，不会被隐蔽上传到任何服务器。"

en-US Value: "Localization by default: Unless you actively turn on and authorize the use of online value-added services such as cloud synchronization (see Section 4.5 for details), all your basic user data will only be stored in your local device and will not be secretly uploaded to any server."
zh-TW Value: "預設情況下的本地化：除非您主動開啟並授權使用雲端同步等線上增值服務（詳見4.5節），否則您的所有基礎使用者資料均僅儲存在您的本地裝置中，不會被隱蔽上傳到任何伺服器。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_1Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "数据位置：默认存储在 %LOCALAPPDATA%\ky3 Launcher 目录下，您可以在设置中自定义数据文件夹位置。"
en-US Value: "Data location: stored in the %LOCALAPPDATA%\ky3 Launcher directory by default. You can customize the data folder location in the settings."
zh-TW Value: "資料位置：預設儲存在 %LOCALAPPDATA%\ky3 Launcher 目錄下，您可以在設定中自定義資料資料夾位置。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_1Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "数据格式：数据使用 SQLite 数据库和 JSON 文件存储，均为标准开放格式，您可以使用任何兼容工具查看。"
en-US Value: "Data format: The data is stored using a SQLite database and JSON files, both in standard open formats that can be viewed using any compatible tool."
zh-TW Value: "資料格式：資料使用 SQLite 資料庫和 JSON 檔案儲存，均為標準開放格式，您可以使用任何相容工具檢視。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_1Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "加密存储：账号 Cookie 等敏感信息使用 Windows 数据保护 API（DPAPI）进行加密存储，确保只有当前 Windows 用户账户才能解密访问。"

en-US Value: "Encrypted storage: Sensitive information such as account cookies is encrypted and stored using Windows Data Protection API (DPAPI) to ensure that only the current Windows user account can decrypt and access it."
zh-TW Value: "加密儲存：賬號 Cookie 等敏感資訊使用 Windows 資料保護 API（DPAPI）進行加密儲存，確保只有當前 Windows 使用者賬戶才能解密訪問。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_1Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【4.1 数据存储方式】"
zh-TW Value: "【4.1 資料儲存方式】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_2Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件不包含任何商业广告 SDK、恶意用户行为追踪组件或隐蔽的数据埋点代码。"
en-US Value: "This software does not contain any commercial advertising SDK, malicious user behavior tracking components or hidden data burrowing code."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體不包含任何商業廣告 SDK、惡意使用者行為追蹤元件或隱蔽的資料埋點程式碼。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_2Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "除您主动使用的在线功能（如数据同步）外，本软件不会主动将您的游戏账号、密码、Cookie 或个人数据上传至任何开发者服务器。"

en-US Value: "Except for the online functions you actively use (such as data synchronization), this software will not actively upload your game account, password, cookies or personal data to any developer server."
zh-TW Value: "除您主動使用的線上功能（如資料同步）外，本軟體不會主動將您的遊戲賬號、密碼、Cookie 或個人資料上傳至任何開發者伺服器。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_2Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "使用在线功能时，仅传输提供该功能所必需的最少数据量。"
en-US Value: "When using online functions, only the minimum amount of data necessary to provide this function is transmitted."
zh-TW Value: "使用線上功能時，僅傳輸提供該功能所必需的最少資料量。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_2Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【4.2 数据收集声明】"
zh-TW Value: "【4.2 資料收集宣告】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_3Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "米哈游官方 API：使用您的账号凭证（Cookie）直接访问米哈游官方服务器获取游戏数据（祈愿记录、实时便笺、深渊数据等）。"
en-US Value: "MiHoYo official API: Use your account credentials (Cookie) to directly access MiHoYo official server to obtain game data (wish records, real-time notes, abyss data, etc.)."
zh-TW Value: "米哈遊官方 API：使用您的賬號憑證（Cookie）直接訪問米哈遊官方伺服器獲取遊戲資料（祈願記錄、實時便箋、深淵資料等）。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_3Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "Enka.Network API：访问 enka.network 获取角色展柜数据，仅需提供游戏 UID（非敏感信息）即可查询。"
en-US Value: "Enka.Network API: Visit enka.network to obtain character showcase data. You only need to provide the game UID (non-sensitive information) to query."
zh-TW Value: "Enka.Network API：訪問 enka.network 獲取角色展櫃資料，僅需提供遊戲 UID（非敏感資訊）即可查詢。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_3Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "GitHub：访问 GitHub 检查软件是否有新版本可用，此过程仅传输版本号等基础握手信息。"
en-US Value: "GitHub: Visit GitHub to check whether a new version of the software is available. This process only transmits basic handshake information such as version numbers."
zh-TW Value: "GitHub：訪問 GitHub 檢查軟體是否有新版本可用，此過程僅傳輸版本號等基礎握手資訊。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_3Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "静态资源 CDN：首次使用时从开发者服务器或对象存储OSS下载游戏角色、武器等静态资源图片。"
en-US Value: "Static resource CDN: Download static resource images such as game characters and weapons from the developer server or object storage OSS when used for the first time."
zh-TW Value: "靜態資源 CDN：首次使用時從開發者伺服器或物件儲存OSS下載遊戲角色、武器等靜態資源圖片。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_3Bullet5".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "开发者服务器：本软件可能与开发者运营的服务器通信，用于提供数据同步、展柜代理等在线增值功能。"
en-US Value: "Developer server: This software may communicate with the server operated by the developer to provide online value-added functions such as data synchronization and showcase agency."
zh-TW Value: "開發者伺服器：本軟體可能與開發者運營的伺服器通訊，用於提供資料同步、展櫃代理等線上增值功能。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_3Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件在运行过程中可能进行以下网络通信，所有通信均为实现软件功能所必需："
en-US Value: "This software may conduct the following network communications during operation, all communications are necessary to realize software functions:"
zh-TW Value: "本軟體在執行過程中可能進行以下網路通訊，所有通訊均為實現軟體功能所必需："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_3Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【4.3 网络通信说明】"
zh-TW Value: "【4.3 網路通訊說明】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_4Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "收集的信息包括：软件版本号、操作系统版本、崩溃堆栈信息、性能指标等纯技术数据。"
en-US Value: "The information collected includes: software version number, operating system version, crash stack information, performance indicators and other purely technical data."
zh-TW Value: "收集的資訊包括：軟體版本號、作業系統版本、崩潰堆疊資訊、效能指標等純技術資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_4Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "严格禁止收集：您的游戏账号、Cookie、真实姓名、物理位置或其他任何可直接识别您身份的敏感数据。"
en-US Value: "It is strictly prohibited to collect: your game account, cookies, real name, physical location or any other sensitive data that can directly identify you."
zh-TW Value: "嚴格禁止收集：您的遊戲賬號、Cookie、真實姓名、物理位置或其他任何可直接識別您身份的敏感資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_4Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件会在首次启动时或设置菜单中提供崩溃报告的明确开启/关闭选项，您可以自由决定是否参与。"
en-US Value: "The software provides an explicit on/off option for crash reporting on first launch or in the settings menu, and you are free to decide whether to participate."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體會在首次啟動時或設定選單中提供崩潰報告的明確開啟/關閉選項，您可以自由決定是否參與。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_4Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件集成了 Sentry 崩溃报告服务，用于收集匿名的应用崩溃信息和性能数据，以帮助开发者改进软件质量。"
en-US Value: "This software integrates the Sentry crash reporting service to collect anonymous application crash information and performance data to help developers improve software quality."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體整合了 Sentry 崩潰報告服務，用於收集匿名的應用崩潰資訊和效能資料，以幫助開發者改進軟體質量。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_4Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【4.4 崩溃报告服务（Sentry）】"
zh-TW Value: "【4.4 崩潰報告服務（Sentry）】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_5Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "数据同步与云备份：在您明确授权的情况下，将祈愿记录等数据同步至开发者服务器，便于跨设备使用。"
en-US Value: "Data synchronization and cloud backup: With your explicit authorization, data such as wish records will be synchronized to the developer server for easy use across devices."
zh-TW Value: "資料同步與雲備份：在您明確授權的情況下，將祈願記錄等資料同步至開發者伺服器，便於跨裝置使用。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_5Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "Enka 展柜代理：通过开发者服务器代理 Enka.Network 请求，提升访问稳定性与速度。"
en-US Value: "Enka showcase proxy: Proxies Enka.Network requests through the developer server to improve access stability and speed."
zh-TW Value: "Enka 展櫃代理：透過開發者伺服器代理 Enka.Network 請求，提升訪問穩定性與速度。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_5Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "其他在线功能：随软件版本更新，可能新增更多需要服务器支持的功能。"
en-US Value: "Other online functions: As the software version is updated, more functions that require server support may be added."
zh-TW Value: "其他線上功能：隨軟體版本更新，可能新增更多需要伺服器支援的功能。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_5Promise1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "仅收集提供服务所必需的最少数据，并采取合理的技术措施保障传输及存储安全。"
en-US Value: "Only collect the minimum data necessary to provide services, and take reasonable technical measures to ensure transmission and storage security."
zh-TW Value: "僅收集提供服務所必需的最少資料，並採取合理的技術措施保障傳輸及儲存安全。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_5Promise2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "绝对不会将您的任何数据出售、共享或非法提供给无关的第三方。"
en-US Value: "Never sell, share or illegally provide any of your data to unrelated third parties."
zh-TW Value: "絕對不會將您的任何資料出售、共享或非法提供給無關的第三方。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_5Promise3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "您可以随时选择不使用需要服务器连接的功能，软件的核心本地功能不受任何影响。"
en-US Value: "You can choose not to use features that require a server connection at any time, and the core local functionality of the software will not be affected in any way."
zh-TW Value: "您可以隨時選擇不使用需要伺服器連線的功能，軟體的核心本地功能不受任何影響。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_5Text1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件可能连接开发者运营的后端服务器，用于提供以下增值功能："
en-US Value: "This software may be connected to a back-end server operated by the developer to provide the following value-added functions:"
zh-TW Value: "本軟體可能連線開發者運營的後端伺服器，用於提供以下增值功能："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_5Text2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "使用上述功能时，开发者承诺："
en-US Value: "When using the above functions, the developer promises:"
zh-TW Value: "使用上述功能時，開發者承諾："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_5Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【4.5 开发者服务器】"
zh-TW Value: "【4.5 開發者伺服器】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_6Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "米哈游官方 API：受米哈游用户协议和隐私政策约束。"
en-US Value: "miHoYo official API: subject to miHoYo User Agreement and Privacy Policy."
zh-TW Value: "米哈遊官方 API：受米哈遊使用者協議和隱私政策約束。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_6Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "GitHub：受 GitHub 隐私政策约束，用于软件更新检查和版本下载。"
en-US Value: "GitHub: Subject to the GitHub Privacy Policy, for software update checks and version downloads."
zh-TW Value: "GitHub：受 GitHub 隱私政策約束，用於軟體更新檢查和版本下載。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_6Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "Enka.Network：受其独立的隐私政策约束，用于角色展柜数据查询。"
en-US Value: "Enka.Network: Subject to its separate privacy policy, used for character showcase data queries."
zh-TW Value: "Enka.Network：受其獨立的隱私政策約束，用於角色展櫃資料查詢。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_6Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "开发者服务器：用于下载静态资源（角色图片、武器图标等）。"
en-US Value: "Developer server: used to download static resources (character pictures, weapon icons, etc.)."
zh-TW Value: "開發者伺服器：用於下載靜態資源（角色圖片、武器圖示等）。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_6Bullet5".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "Sentry：受 Sentry 隐私政策约束，用于匿名崩溃报告。"
en-US Value: "Sentry: Subject to the Sentry Privacy Policy, for anonymous crash reporting."
zh-TW Value: "Sentry：受 Sentry 隱私政策約束，用於匿名崩潰報告。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_6Bullet6".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "使用涉及第三方接口的功能（如 Enka 展柜、GitHub 更新、Sentry 报错），即视为您知晓并同意相关非敏感数据可能发生合法的跨境传输。"

en-US Value: "By using functions involving third-party interfaces (such as Enka showcase, GitHub update, Sentry error reporting), you are deemed to be aware and agree that relevant non-sensitive data may be legally transferred across borders."
zh-TW Value: "使用涉及第三方介面的功能（如 Enka 展櫃、GitHub 更新、Sentry 報錯），即視為您知曉並同意相關非敏感資料可能發生合法的跨境傳輸。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_6Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件可能使用以下第三方服务，这些服务有其独立的隐私政策，且其服务器可能位于您所在国家或地区境外："
en-US Value: "This software may use the following third-party services, which have their own independent privacy policies and whose servers may be located outside your country or region:"
zh-TW Value: "本軟體可能使用以下第三方服務，這些服務有其獨立的隱私政策，且其伺服器可能位於您所在國家或地區境外："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_6Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【4.6 第三方服务与跨境数据流动】"
en-US Value: "[4.6 Third-party services and cross-border data flows]"
zh-TW Value: "【4.6 第三方服務與跨境資料流動】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_7Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "定期备份：强烈建议您定期备份数据文件夹，以防不可预见的硬件故障导致意外数据丢失。"
en-US Value: "Regular backup: It is highly recommended that you back up your data folders regularly to prevent unexpected data loss due to unforeseen hardware failure."
zh-TW Value: "定期備份：強烈建議您定期備份資料資料夾，以防不可預見的硬體故障導致意外資料丟失。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_7Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "妥善保管：请绝对保密您的数据文件夹，其中包含可直接登录您账号的加密凭证，请勿分享给他人。"
en-US Value: "Keep it safe: Please keep your data folder strictly confidential. It contains encrypted credentials that can directly log in to your account. Do not share it with others."
zh-TW Value: "妥善保管：請絕對保密您的資料資料夾，其中包含可直接登入您賬號的加密憑證，請勿分享給他人。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_7Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "系统安全：建议保持操作系统和安全软件更新，防范木马或恶意软件窃取您的本地数据。"
en-US Value: "System security: It is recommended to keep the operating system and security software updated to prevent Trojans or malware from stealing your local data."
zh-TW Value: "系統安全：建議保持作業系統和安全軟體更新，防範木馬或惡意軟體竊取您的本地資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_7Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "官方渠道：请务必仅从官方 GitHub 仓库或认定的可信来源下载本软件，拒绝使用来路不明的魔改版本。"

en-US Value: "Official channels: Please be sure to only download this software from the official GitHub repository or recognized trusted sources, and refuse to use modified versions from unknown sources."
zh-TW Value: "官方渠道：請務必僅從官方 GitHub 倉庫或認定的可信來源下載本軟體，拒絕使用來路不明的魔改版本。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_7Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【4.7 数据安全建议】"
zh-TW Value: "【4.7 資料安全建議】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_8Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "完全控制权：您对存储在本地的所有数据拥有 100% 的控制权和所有权。"
en-US Value: "Full Control: You have 100% control and ownership of all data stored locally."
zh-TW Value: "完全控制權：您對儲存在本地的所有資料擁有 100% 的控制權和所有權。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_8Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "随时删除：您可以随时删除数据文件夹或卸载软件，无需担心云端产生无法清除的残留数据。"
en-US Value: "Delete at any time: You can delete the data folder or uninstall the software at any time without worrying about residual data in the cloud that cannot be cleared."
zh-TW Value: "隨時刪除：您可以隨時刪除資料資料夾或解除安裝軟體，無需擔心雲端產生無法清除的殘留資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_8Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "数据导出：所有数据以标准格式存储，您可以自由导出、备份和迁移。"
en-US Value: "Data export: All data is stored in a standard format, and you can export, backup and migrate freely."
zh-TW Value: "資料匯出：所有資料以標準格式儲存，您可以自由匯出、備份和遷移。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_8Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "数据可移植：祈愿记录支持 UIGF 标准格式导出，可无缝迁移至其他兼容该标准的工具。"
en-US Value: "Data portability: Prayer records support UIGF standard format export and can be seamlessly migrated to other tools compatible with this standard."
zh-TW Value: "資料可移植：祈願記錄支援 UIGF 標準格式匯出，可無縫遷移至其他相容該標準的工具。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide4_8Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【4.8 用户数据权利】"
zh-TW Value: "【4.8 使用者資料權利】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "第五章 免责声明与风险提示（必读）"
en-US Value: "Chapter 5 Disclaimer and Risk Warning (Must Read)"
zh-TW Value: "第五章 免責宣告與風險提示（必讀）"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_1Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件是完全独立的第三方辅助体验工具，与上海米哈游网络科技股份有限公司（miHoYo / HoYoverse）没有任何形式的关联、合作或官方授权。"

en-US Value: "This software is a completely independent third-party auxiliary experience tool and does not have any form of association, cooperation or official authorization with Shanghai MiHoYo Network Technology Co., Ltd. (miHoYo/HoYoverse)."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體是完全獨立的第三方輔助體驗工具，與上海米哈遊網路科技股份有限公司（miHoYo / HoYoverse）沒有任何形式的關聯、合作或官方授權。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_1Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件不代表、不暗示获得任何游戏官方的认可、背书或推荐。"
en-US Value: "This software does not represent or imply official approval, endorsement or recommendation of any game."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體不代表、不暗示獲得任何遊戲官方的認可、背書或推薦。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_1Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "因使用本软件引发的任何游戏内资产损失或连带后果，游戏官方及本软件开发者均不承担任何责任。"
en-US Value: "Neither the game official nor the developer of this software assumes any responsibility for any loss of in-game assets or collateral consequences caused by the use of this software."
zh-TW Value: "因使用本軟體引發的任何遊戲內資產損失或連帶後果，遊戲官方及本軟體開發者均不承擔任何責任。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_1Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【5.1 与游戏官方的关系】"
en-US Value: "[5.1 Relationship with game officials]"
zh-TW Value: "【5.1 與遊戲官方的關係】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_2Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "虽然本软件的大部分功能通过官方公开接口合法获取数据，但根据游戏官方政策，使用任何第三方工具均可能存在违规风险。"

en-US Value: "Although most functions of this software legally obtain data through the official public interface, according to the game's official policy, the use of any third-party tools may involve the risk of violation."
zh-TW Value: "雖然本軟體的大部分功能透過官方公開介面合法獲取資料，但根據遊戲官方政策，使用任何第三方工具均可能存在違規風險。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_2Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "开发者绝对无法保证使用本软件不会导致您的游戏账号受到警告、限制登录或永久封禁。"
en-US Value: "The developer has absolutely no guarantee that using this software will not cause your game account to be warned, restricted from logging in, or permanently banned."
zh-TW Value: "開發者絕對無法保證使用本軟體不會導致您的遊戲賬號受到警告、限制登入或永久封禁。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_2Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "您应当利用自身判断力评估使用本软件的风险，并对使用的所有后果承担 100% 的独立责任。"
en-US Value: "You should use your own judgment to evaluate the risks of using this software and you are 100% solely responsible for all consequences of your use."
zh-TW Value: "您應當利用自身判斷力評估使用本軟體的風險，並對使用的所有後果承擔 100% 的獨立責任。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_2Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "如发生账号封禁等处罚事件，开发者不承担任何形式的申诉协助义务，亦不提供任何经济赔偿或补偿。"

en-US Value: "In the event of account ban or other punishment events, the developer will not assume any form of appeal assistance obligation, nor will it provide any financial compensation or compensation."
zh-TW Value: "如發生賬號封禁等處罰事件，開發者不承擔任何形式的申訴協助義務，亦不提供任何經濟賠償或補償。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_2Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【5.2 账号安全与封禁风险】"
en-US Value: "[5.2 Account security and ban risks]"
zh-TW Value: "【5.2 賬號安全與封禁風險】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_3Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "FPS 解锁与 Island 等功能通过插件加载技术实现，此类技术明确违反游戏官方《用户协议》及反作弊系统（如 mhyprot）的运行规则。"

en-US Value: "Functions such as FPS unlocking and Island are implemented through plug-in loading technology. Such technology clearly violates the official "User Agreement" of the game and the operating rules of anti-cheating systems (such as mhyprot)."
zh-TW Value: "FPS 解鎖與 Island 等功能透過外掛載入技術實現，此類技術明確違反遊戲官方《使用者協議》及反作弊系統（如 mhyprot）的執行規則。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_3Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "开启并使用此类功能即代表您"明知故犯"地主动违反游戏官方服务条款。"
en-US Value: "Turning on and using such functions means that you "knowingly" actively violate the game's official terms of service."
zh-TW Value: "開啟並使用此類功能即代表您"明知故犯"地主動違反遊戲官方服務條款。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_3Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "此功能随时可能被游戏反作弊机制精准检测，由此导致的账号连带处罚风险完全由您自行承担。"
en-US Value: "This function may be accurately detected by the game's anti-cheating mechanism at any time, and the risk of account penalties resulting therefrom is entirely borne by you."
zh-TW Value: "此功能隨時可能被遊戲反作弊機制精準檢測，由此導致的賬號連帶處罰風險完全由您自行承擔。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_3Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "此功能极易被 Windows Defender 或其他杀毒软件识别为恶意威胁并拦截，此属技术层面的正常现象，并非软件包含病毒。"

en-US Value: "This function is easily recognized as a malicious threat and intercepted by Windows Defender or other anti-virus software. This is a normal phenomenon at the technical level and does not mean that the software contains viruses."
zh-TW Value: "此功能極易被 Windows Defender 或其他防毒軟體識別為惡意威脅並攔截，此屬技術層面的正常現象，並非軟體包含病毒。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_3Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【5.3 插件加载风险】"
zh-TW Value: "【5.3 外掛載入風險】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_4Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "对适销性、特定用途的适用性、可靠性及非侵权性的暗示担保。"
en-US Value: "IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, RELIABILITY AND NON-INFRINGEMENT."
zh-TW Value: "對適銷性、特定用途的適用性、可靠性及非侵權性的暗示擔保。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_4Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "对本软件完全无错误、不中断运行或绝对满足您特定期望的担保。"
en-US Value: "A warranty that the Software will be error-free, operate without interruption, or will absolutely meet your specific expectations."
zh-TW Value: "對本軟體完全無錯誤、不中斷執行或絕對滿足您特定期望的擔保。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_4Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "对因下载、安装、使用本软件而导致的任何直接、间接、偶发、特殊或惩罚性的损害赔偿（包括但不限于设备损坏、数据丢失、利润损失）。"

en-US Value: "Compensation for any direct, indirect, incidental, special or punitive damages (including but not limited to equipment damage, data loss, loss of profits) resulting from the downloading, installation, and use of this software."
zh-TW Value: "對因下載、安裝、使用本軟體而導致的任何直接、間接、偶發、特殊或懲罰性的損害賠償（包括但不限於裝置損壞、資料丟失、利潤損失）。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_4Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "在适用法律允许的最大范围内，本软件按"原样"（AS IS）且"可用"（AS AVAILABLE）的状态提供，开发者明确否认任何形式的明示或暗示担保，包括但不限于："

en-US Value: "To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the Software is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" and the Developer expressly disclaims all warranties of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to:"
zh-TW Value: "在適用法律允許的最大範圍內，本軟體按"原樣"（AS IS）且"可用"（AS AVAILABLE）的狀態提供，開發者明確否認任何形式的明示或暗示擔保，包括但不限於："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_4Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【5.4 软件担保的绝对免责】"
en-US Value: "[5.4 Absolute Disclaimer of Software Warranty]"
zh-TW Value: "【5.4 軟體擔保的絕對免責】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_5Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "用户误操作（如误删、误格式化）导致的数据不可逆丢失。"
en-US Value: "Irreversible loss of data caused by user misuse (such as accidental deletion, incorrect formatting)."
zh-TW Value: "使用者誤操作（如誤刪、誤格式化）導致的資料不可逆丟失。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_5Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "操作系统崩溃、硬盘物理损坏或第三方恶意软件攻击造成的数据毁损。"
en-US Value: "Data corruption caused by operating system crashes, physical damage to the hard drive, or third-party malware attacks."
zh-TW Value: "作業系統崩潰、硬碟物理損壞或第三方惡意軟體攻擊造成的資料毀損。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_5Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "游戏官方 API 变更、接口加密机制强制升级导致的数据抓取永久或暂时性失效。"
en-US Value: "Permanent or temporary failure of data capture caused by changes in the game's official API and forced upgrades to the interface encryption mechanism."
zh-TW Value: "遊戲官方 API 變更、介面加密機制強制升級導致的資料抓取永久或暫時性失效。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_5Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "第三方服务（如 Enka.Network 限流、宕机）导致的功能异常。"
en-US Value: "Functional abnormalities caused by third-party services (such as Enka.Network current limit and downtime)."
zh-TW Value: "第三方服務（如 Enka.Network 限流、宕機）導致的功能異常。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_5Bullet5".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "开发者对上述第三方因素引发的问题不承担强制修复的义务。"
en-US Value: "The developer does not assume any obligation to forcefully repair problems caused by the above-mentioned third-party factors."
zh-TW Value: "開發者對上述第三方因素引發的問題不承擔強制修復的義務。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_5Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "虽然本软件尽力确保数据的完整性和功能性，但在适用法律允许的最大范围内，开发者不对以下情况导致的任何损失承担责任："
en-US Value: "Although this software strives to ensure data integrity and functionality, to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the developer is not responsible for any losses caused by:"
zh-TW Value: "雖然本軟體盡力確保資料的完整性和功能性，但在適用法律允許的最大範圍內，開發者不對以下情況導致的任何損失承擔責任："

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide5_5Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【5.5 数据丢失与服务异常免责】"
en-US Value: "[5.5 Disclaimer of data loss and service abnormality]"
zh-TW Value: "【5.5 資料丟失與服務異常免責】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "第六章 用户行为规范"
en-US Value: "Chapter 6 User Code of Conduct"
zh-TW Value: "第六章 使用者行為規範"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_1Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "您应当确保下载和使用本软件的行为完全符合您所在国家或地区的全部现行法律法规。"
en-US Value: "You should ensure that your downloading and use of this software fully complies with all current laws and regulations in your country or region."
zh-TW Value: "您應當確保下載和使用本軟體的行為完全符合您所在國家或地區的全部現行法律法規。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_1Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "严禁利用本软件从事任何涉嫌诈骗、侵权、破坏计算机信息系统等违法活动。"
en-US Value: "It is strictly prohibited to use this software to engage in any illegal activities such as fraud, infringement, damage to computer information systems, etc."
zh-TW Value: "嚴禁利用本軟體從事任何涉嫌詐騙、侵權、破壞計算機資訊系統等違法活動。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_1Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "不得利用本软件的高级功能恶意干扰游戏服务器的正常运营或破坏游戏公平性。"
en-US Value: "The advanced functions of this software may not be used to maliciously interfere with the normal operation of the game server or undermine the fairness of the game."
zh-TW Value: "不得利用本軟體的高階功能惡意干擾遊戲伺服器的正常運營或破壞遊戲公平性。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_1Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_2Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "以营利为目的，将本软件包装、倒卖或作为收费外挂的一部分进行商业分发。"
en-US Value: "For profit-making purposes, this software is packaged, resold, or commercially distributed as part of a paid plug-in."
zh-TW Value: "以營利為目的，將本軟體包裝、倒賣或作為收費外掛的一部分進行商業分發。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_2Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "对本软件的开源代码进行恶意篡改，植入计算机病毒、广告后门或木马程序后向公众散播。"
en-US Value: "Maliciously tamper with the open source code of this software, implant computer viruses, advertising backdoors or Trojan programs and then spread them to the public."
zh-TW Value: "對本軟體的開原始碼進行惡意篡改，植入計算機病毒、廣告後門或木馬程式後向公眾散播。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_2Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "冒用本软件官方名义或开发者身份建立虚假社群进行钓鱼或欺诈。"
en-US Value: "Pretend to use the official name or developer identity of the software to establish a false community for phishing or fraud."
zh-TW Value: "冒用本軟體官方名義或開發者身份建立虛假社群進行釣魚或欺詐。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_2Bullet4".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "利用本软件的账号记忆功能从事非法盗号、游戏账号地下交易等黑色产业链活动。"
en-US Value: "Use the account memory function of this software to engage in black industry chain activities such as illegal account theft and underground trading of game accounts."
zh-TW Value: "利用本軟體的賬號記憶功能從事非法盜號、遊戲賬號地下交易等黑色產業鏈活動。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_2Bullet5".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "利用工具脚本自动化、高频次地恶意请求 API 接口，对游戏官方或第三方服务器造成实质性攻击（如 DDoS）。"
en-US Value: "Use tool scripts to automate and make high-frequency malicious requests to API interfaces, causing substantial attacks (such as DDoS) to official game or third-party servers."
zh-TW Value: "利用工具指令碼自動化、高頻次地惡意請求 API 介面，對遊戲官方或第三方伺服器造成實質性攻擊（如 DDoS）。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_2Title".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_3Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "若您是未满 18 周岁（或您所在地区法定成年年龄）的未成年人，请务必在您的父母或其他法定监护人陪同、指导下共同仔细阅读并同意本协议。"

en-US Value: "If you are a minor under the age of 18 (or the legal age of majority in your area), please be sure to carefully read and agree to this Agreement with the company and guidance of your parents or other legal guardians."
zh-TW Value: "若您是未滿 18 週歲（或您所在地區法定成年年齡）的未成年人，請務必在您的父母或其他法定監護人陪同、指導下共同仔細閱讀並同意本協議。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_3Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "未成年人使用本软件可能带来的沉迷游戏或账号违规风险，应由监护人加强监督与引导。"
en-US Value: "The use of this software by minors may lead to risks of game addiction or account violations, and guardians should strengthen supervision and guidance."
zh-TW Value: "未成年人使用本軟體可能帶來的沉迷遊戲或賬號違規風險，應由監護人加強監督與引導。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_3Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "因监护人未尽到监护义务，导致未成年人使用本软件引发的一切不良后果及法律责任，均由法定监护人完全承担。"

en-US Value: "All adverse consequences and legal responsibilities caused by minors using this software due to the guardian's failure to fulfill their guardianship obligations shall be fully borne by the legal guardian."
zh-TW Value: "因監護人未盡到監護義務，導致未成年人使用本軟體引發的一切不良後果及法律責任，均由法定監護人完全承擔。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide6_3Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【6.3 未成年人特别保护声明】"
en-US Value: "[6.3 Statement on Special Protection of Minors]"
zh-TW Value: "【6.3 未成年人特別保護宣告】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "第七章 其他条款"
zh-TW Value: "第七章 其他條款"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_1Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "开发者保留在必要时随时修改本协议的权利，修改后的最新协议将随新版本软件一同发布生效。"

en-US Value: "The developer reserves the right to modify this agreement at any time when necessary, and the latest modified agreement will take effect when it is released with the new version of the software."
zh-TW Value: "開發者保留在必要時隨時修改本協議的權利，修改後的最新協議將隨新版本軟體一同釋出生效。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_1Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "在协议更新后，您继续运行或使用本软件的行为，即视为您已无条件接受并同意修改后的全部条款。"
en-US Value: "Your continued operation or use of this software after the agreement is updated shall be deemed to be your unconditional acceptance and agreement to all the revised terms."
zh-TW Value: "在協議更新後，您繼續執行或使用本軟體的行為，即視為您已無條件接受並同意修改後的全部條款。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_1Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "如果您拒绝接受更新后的条款，您唯一的救济途径是立即卸载本软件并清空相关数据。"
en-US Value: "If you refuse to accept the updated terms, your only remedy is to immediately uninstall the software and clear related data."
zh-TW Value: "如果您拒絕接受更新後的條款，您唯一的救濟途徑是立即解除安裝本軟體並清空相關資料。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_1Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【7.1 协议的生效与更新】"
en-US Value: "[7.1 Effectiveness and update of the agreement]"
zh-TW Value: "【7.1 協議的生效與更新】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_2Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "如本协议中的任何条款被拥有管辖权的法院或机构认定为部分或全部无效、不合法或不可执行，该条款将被视为从本协议中独立剔除。"

en-US Value: "If any provision of this Agreement is determined to be partially or completely invalid, illegal or unenforceable by a court or agency with competent jurisdiction, that provision will be deemed to be independently severed from this Agreement."
zh-TW Value: "如本協議中的任何條款被擁有管轄權的法院或機構認定為部分或全部無效、不合法或不可執行，該條款將被視為從本協議中獨立剔除。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_2Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "上述无效条款的剔除绝不影响本协议其余所有条款的完全法律效力和可执行性。"
en-US Value: "The elimination of the above invalid provisions will in no way affect the full legal validity and enforceability of all remaining provisions of this agreement."
zh-TW Value: "上述無效條款的剔除絕不影響本協議其餘所有條款的完全法律效力和可執行性。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_2Title".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "【7.2 协议可分割性】"
zh-TW Value: "【7.2 協議可分割性】"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_3Bullet1".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本协议的成立、生效、履行、解释及争议解决，均严格适用中华人民共和国大陆地区法律（排除冲突法的适用）。"

en-US Value: "The establishment, effectiveness, performance, interpretation and dispute resolution of this Agreement shall strictly be governed by the laws of the Mainland China (excluding the application of conflict of laws)."

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_3Bullet2".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "因本协议或使用本软件引发的任何纠纷或争议，双方应首先本着诚实信用原则进行友好协商。"
en-US Value: "For any disputes or controversies arising from this Agreement or the use of this Software, both parties shall first conduct friendly negotiations based on the principle of good faith."

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_3Bullet3".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "若协商不成，任何一方均必须向【本软件核心开发者或主要项目维护团队所在地】有管辖权的人民法院提起诉讼，排除其他任何法院的管辖权。"

en-US Value: "If negotiation fails, either party must file a lawsuit with the people's court with jurisdiction [where the core developer of this software or the main project maintenance team is located], excluding the jurisdiction of any other court."

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuide7_4Text".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本协议及随附的隐私政策构成了您与开发者之间关于使用本软件的唯一、完整且最终的协议，并自动取代双方此前就此达成的任何口头、书面或电子形式的声明与共识。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewGuideWarning".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "重要提示：请您务必仔细阅读以下全部内容（特别是关于免责、风险提示及管辖权的条款）。在适用法律允许的最大范围内，使用本软件即表示您已完全理解、同意并自愿承担本协议的全部约束。本软件包含的插件加载等高级功能明确违反游戏官方用户协议，存在导致游戏账号被永久封禁的绝对风险。如您不同意本协议的任何内容，请立即停止使用并彻底卸载本软件。"

en-US Value: "Important note: Please be sure to read all the following contents carefully (especially the terms regarding disclaimers, risk warnings and jurisdiction). To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, by using the Software, you fully understand, agree and voluntarily assume all the obligations of this Agreement. The advanced functions such as plug-in loading contained in this software clearly violate the official user agreement of the game, and there is an absolute risk of causing the game account to be permanently banned. If you do not agree to any content of this agreement, please stop using it immediately and completely uninstall the software."
zh-TW Value: "重要提示：請您務必仔細閱讀以下全部內容（特別是關於免責、風險提示及管轄權的條款）。在適用法律允許的最大範圍內，使用本軟體即表示您已完全理解、同意並自願承擔本協議的全部約束。本軟體包含的外掛載入等高階功能明確違反遊戲官方使用者協議，存在導致遊戲賬號被永久封禁的絕對風險。如您不同意本協議的任何內容，請立即停止使用並徹底解除安裝本軟體。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewPageLaunchGameDangerousDescriptionHint".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "本软件及插件功能属于《米哈游用户协议》第十条第二款规定的“插件、外挂或非经合法授权的第三方工具/服务”，您需要自行承担因使用内容而引起的所有风险，本软件无法且不会对您因前述风险而导致的任何损失或损害承担责任。 出于安全因素考虑，我们有权不经向您特别通知而对软件及相关功能进行更新，或者对软件的部分功能效果进行改变或限制。"

en-US Value: "This software and plug-in functions are "plug-ins, plug-ins or third-party tools/services that are not legally authorized" as stipulated in the second paragraph of Article 10 of the "MiHoYo User Agreement". You need to bear all risks arising from the use of the content. This software cannot and will not be responsible for any loss or damage caused by the aforementioned risks. For security reasons, we have the right to update the software and related functions, or change or limit some functional effects of the software without special notice to you."
zh-TW Value: "本軟體及外掛功能屬於《米哈遊使用者協議》第十條第二款規定的“外掛、外掛或非經合法授權的第三方工具/服務”，您需要自行承擔因使用內容而引起的所有風險，本軟體無法且不會對您因前述風險而導致的任何損失或損害承擔責任。 出於安全因素考慮，我們有權不經向您特別通知而對軟體及相關功能進行更新，或者對軟體的部分功能效果進行改變或限制。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewPageLaunchGameFixLowFovSceneHeader".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewPageLaunchGameFixLowFovSceneTeachingTipSubtitle".
summary.code: Neutral Value: "启用「调整视野」后，所有场景下的迷雾显示将会遵循「移除迷雾」开关的状态。若同时启用了「特殊界面修正」，则会在原始视野小于等于 30 时，强制禁用迷雾渲染。这会让你看到正常的祈愿/纪行/角色等界面，但是在进入部分剧情时也会强制禁用迷雾。这不属于软件 BUG，不要向我们反馈。"

en-US Value: "After "Adjust Vision" is enabled, the fog display in all scenes will follow the status of the "Remove Fog" switch. If "Special Interface Correction" is enabled at the same time, fog rendering will be forcibly disabled when the original field of view is less than or equal to 30. This will allow you to see the normal wish/journey/character interface, but it will also force the fog to be disabled when entering some plots. This is not a software BUG, ​​please do not report it to us."
zh-TW Value: "啟用「調整視野」後，所有場景下的迷霧顯示將會遵循「移除迷霧」開關的狀態。若同時啟用了「特殊介面修正」，則會在原始視野小於等於 30 時，強制禁用迷霧渲染。這會讓你看到正常的祈願/紀行/角色等介面，但是在進入部分劇情時也會強制禁用迷霧。這不屬於軟體 BUG，不要向我們反饋。"

summary.para: Looks up a localized string for "ViewPageLaunchGameInjectionDialogTitle".
Looks up a localized string for "ViewPageLaunchGameInjectionDisclaimerContent".
summary.code:
Neutral Value: "开启插件功能后，ky3 Launcher 将向原神游戏进程加载消息模块（DLL 插件），以实现以下功能：
· 视野调整 / 移除迷雾 · 帧率解锁 / 禁用垂直同步 · 禁用角色渐隐 / 移除 Q 动画播放 · 隐藏地图卡片 / 隐藏菜单 UID / 隐藏游戏内 UID · 随身合成台 / 可合成重定向 · 移除队伍配置进度条 / 移除战斗伤害数字 · 探索派遣快捷键 / 烹饪快捷键 / 锻造快捷键 · 手机端模式 / 重载配置热键
风险提示： 1. 上述功能通过修改游戏运行时内存实现，属于第三方干预行为。 2. 使用这些功能违反《原神》用户服务协议，可能导致账号被永久封禁。 3. 插件加载操作可能引起游戏崩溃、数据异常或与反作弊系统冲突。 4. 开发者不对因使用插件功能导致的任何后果（包括但不限于封号、数据丢失）承担任何责任。 5. 您应自行承担使用这些功能所带来的全部风险。
如您已充分了解上述风险并自愿使用，请在下方手动输入以下文字："

en-US Value: "After turning on the plug-in function, ky3 Launcher will load the message module (DLL plug-in) into the Genshin Impact game process to achieve the following functions:
· Vision adjustment/removal of fog · Frame rate unlock/disable vertical sync · Disable character fade/remove Q animation playback · Hide map card / Hide menu UID / Hide in-game UID · Portable synthesis station / can synthesize redirection ·Remove team configuration progress bar/remove combat damage numbers · Expedition shortcut keys / cooking shortcut keys / forging shortcut keys ·Mobile mode/reload configuration hotkey
Risk warning: 1. The above functions are implemented by modifying the memory when the game is running, which is an act of third-party intervention. 2. Using these functions violates the "Genshin Impact" User Service Agreement and may result in the account being permanently banned. 3. The plug-in loading operation may cause game crashes, data anomalies, or conflicts with the anti-cheat system. 4. The developer does not assume any responsibility for any consequences (including but not limited to account ban and data loss) caused by the use of plug-in functions. 5. Your use of these features is entirely at your own risk.
If you fully understand the above risks and use it voluntarily, please manually enter the following text below:"

zh-TW Value: "開啟外掛功能後，ky3 Launcher 將向原神遊戲程序載入訊息模組（DLL 外掛），以實現以下功能：
· 視野調整 / 移除迷霧 · 幀率解鎖 / 禁用垂直同步 · 禁用角色漸隱 / 移除 Q 動畫播放 · 隱藏地圖卡片 / 隱藏選單 UID / 隱藏遊戲內 UID · 隨身合成臺 / 可合成重定向 · 移除隊伍配置進度條 / 移除戰鬥傷害數字 · 探索派遣快捷鍵 / 烹飪快捷鍵 / 鍛造快捷鍵 · 手機端模式 / 過載配置熱鍵
風險提示： 1. 上述功能透過修改遊戲執行時記憶體實現，屬於第三方干預行為。 2. 使用這些功能違反《原神》使用者服務協議，可能導致賬號被永久封禁。 3. 外掛載入操作可能引起遊戲崩潰、資料異常或與反作弊系統衝突。 4. 開發者不對因使用外掛功能導致的任何後果（包括但不限於封號、資料丟失）承擔任何責任。 5. 您應自行承擔使用這些功能所帶來的全部風險。
如您已充分了解上述風險並自願使用，請在下方手動輸入以下文字："

summary.code: Neutral Value: "若在启用此功能后帧率无法超过 60/显示器帧率 但其他功能正常，那么这一定不是软件 BUG，不要向我们反馈。请自行检查 游戏设置/显卡驱动设置/显示器设置 中是否未关闭（包括但不限于）垂直同步，最大帧率限制，智能插帧等功能。"

en-US Value: "If the frame rate cannot exceed 60/monitor frame rate after enabling this feature but other functions are normal, then this must not be a software BUG and do not report it to us. Please check by yourself whether the functions (including but not limited to) vertical synchronization, maximum frame rate limit, smart frame insertion, etc. are not turned off in game settings/graphics driver settings/monitor settings."
zh-TW Value: "若在啟用此功能後幀率無法超過 60/顯示器幀率 但其他功能正常，那麼這一定不是軟體 BUG，不要向我們反饋。請自行檢查 遊戲設定/顯示卡驅動設定/顯示器設定 中是否未關閉（包括但不限於）垂直同步，最大幀率限制，智慧插幀等功能。"
